Hourly Price Series

Interactive view of the full hourly EPEX-style target series used for the aligned exogenous analysis.

What This Chart Is

A time-series line chart of hourly electricity price across the full available horizon in the audited hourly panel.

What Data Is Used

Column used: price from old/price_2015_2025.csv, restricted to timestamps where minute == 0. This is the target series in hourly_panel_raw.

How To Read It

The x-axis is time and the y-axis is price in EUR/MWh. Drag to zoom into a period, double-click to reset, and hover to inspect exact timestamps and values.

What It Shows

Long-run price behavior, including volatility changes, spikes, crashes, negative-price periods, and structural shifts over time.

Why It Matters

It shows why forecasting is difficult: the target is not stable, has extreme events, and does not behave like a low-noise stationary process.

Important Notes

  • Negative prices are real observations in this dataset and should not be clipped away without a modeling reason.
  • This page uses only top-of-hour prices so it aligns with hourly exogenous sources.
